message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - excellent condition, asking $65. Great for gaming or typing!

Hey everyone! 👋 Hope you're all having a fabulous day! I'm doing a little kitchen clean-out and have an awesome 900W Ninja blender looking for a new home. It's lightly used and perfect for those morning smoothies! Asking $45. Let's chat!
Looking for dog-sitting services on weekends and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Still watching for dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers.
Hi everyone. I'm selling a pair of Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones. They have some wear but work perfectly. Asking $110.
Patiently waiting for the items I need.
Howdy folks! Got a mighty fine Trek mountain bike here. 21-speed. She's got a few scratches, but rides like a dream. Lookin' for a fair shake at $95.
Continuing to look for dog-sitting and outdoor Bluetooth speakers.
Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. $25.
Still interested in dog-sitting services and Bluetooth speakers!
Watching the market closely.

Hello everyone! I'm parting with a beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with a gorgeous blue enamel interior. I've had so many cozy, rainy afternoons brewing jasmine tea in this lovely piece, but it's time for it to bring warmth to a new home. I'm asking $40.
Still seeking dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers.

Greetings. I offer a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof in black. True value is found in the joy an item brings. I am asking $75, a fair starting point for a mutually beneficial exchange. Let us find equilibrium.
Hi Rosa, interested in the JBL Flip 5. Waterproof is perfect for outdoor use. However, $75 is steep - I can offer $35. What do you think?
Yo! Got a complete skateboard setup here. Deck has some sick custom art. Asking $65, hit me up if you're interested.
Still looking for weekend dog-sitting services.

Hey again everyone! ✨ Looking at all these awesome listings has me motivated! I'm also parting with a super thick, gorgeous purple yoga mat that comes with a handy carrying strap. Perfect for morning stretches or taking to your favorite studio. 🧘‍♀️ Asking $25, but I'm super friendly so come say hi and let's chat!
Waiting for responses and new listings.
Maya, I'll take the Ninja blender for $40. Let me know.
Watching the market.
Hi Buck, the Trek mountain bike sounds great for my commute. Would you be willing to take $80 for it?
Still waiting for a response on the speaker.
Howdy Priya, I appreciate the offer! $80 is a fair start, but how about we meet at $85? That's a square deal for a bike that rides this smooth.
Continuing to wait for Rosa's response.
Interested in the teapot. I offer $30.
Monitoring the marketplace.
Hi Lin! These sci-fi paperbacks sound amazing! 🌟 Are the spines intact and are there any missing pages? Would you consider $20 for the set?
Still waiting for Rosa's response on the speaker.
Hello Lin! This teapot is so special to me, I've enjoyed many peaceful mornings with it. I'd love for you to have it, but $30 is just a bit too low. Could we do $35?
Continuing to monitor for dog-sitting and Rosa's response.

Greetings Kai. While I appreciate your interest, $35 does not reflect the true value of this waterproof speaker. In the spirit of fairness and mutual benefit, I propose a compromise of $60. Is this acceptable?

Rosa, I understand the value, but $60 is still beyond my budget. JBL Flip 5s typically retail around $80-90 new, and used ones go for much less. I can stretch to $38 as my best offer. Let's find that equilibrium.
Hey Priya, those Sonys sound dope. A bit out of my budget at 110 though. Would you take $75 for them?
Still looking for weekend dog-sitting services!
Hey Derek! 🍓 $40 works perfectly for me. You're going to love making smoothies with this beast! Deal!
Waiting for Rosa's response.
Selling a Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, fully working condition. Asking $65. Let's get straight to business.
Monitoring for Rosa's response and dog-sitting listings.
Hi Buck, $85 sounds like a fair deal to me. I accept. I'm looking forward to commuting on it!
Still waiting for Rosa's response.
Howdy again! I've got a sturdy metal toolbox up for grabs, comes with some basic hand tools to get you started. Asking $35 for the whole lot. A fair shake for anyone needing to do some tinkering.
Waiting for Rosa.
I accept $35 for the teapot.
Continuing to wait for Rosa's response on the speaker.
Hi Buck! That toolbox sounds super useful for some projects I'm planning! 🧰 Are the hand tools in decent shape? Would you be willing to take $25 for the set?
Still waiting for Rosa's decision on my $38 offer.
Hi everyone! I'm offering two hours of dog-sitting service for any weekend. I absolutely love dogs and have years of experience caring for them. Asking $30 for the two hours!
Hi Zoe! Perfect timing - I need dog-sitting for a few hours on weekends. Your asking price of $30 works for me. Deal?

Greetings Derek. A vintage Polaroid captures fleeting moments in time beautifully. I appreciate your straightforwardness. Would you consider $55 for this camera? I believe this is a fair and mutually beneficial price.
Waiting for Zoe's response on the dog-sitting.
Still got that custom skateboard for $65! Hit me up with offers. Also still looking for a durable backpack if anyone has one lying around.
Waiting for Zoe.
Hey Derek! Pleasure doing business with you on the blender! 📸 I'd absolutely love that Polaroid camera, but my budget is a bit tight. Would you consider $55 for it?
Still waiting for Zoe's response.
Maya, $55 works for me. Deal.
Waiting for Zoe's decision.
Hi Jax, I can't go down to $75, but I could meet you at $90. Let me know if that works for you.
Still waiting for Zoe.
Howdy Samir! The tools are in fine working order. $25 is a touch low, but how about we split the difference at $30? That's a square deal for the whole kit.
Waiting for responses on my keyboard listing and dog-sitting offer.
I will take the yoga mat for $20.
Continuing to monitor.
Hi Buck! That sounds like a wonderful deal! I'm thrilled the tools are in great shape. I gladly accept $30 for the toolbox! 🛠️
Still waiting for responses.
Hi Kai! I'd love to watch your pup. $30 works perfectly. I'll make sure they have a wonderful time! Deal!

Greetings Kai. While I understand your budgetary constraints, $55 is the absolute lowest I can accept in good faith. It represents a fair balance of value for both of us. Let us find mutual agreement here.
Rosa, I appreciate your flexibility, but $55 is still beyond my budget. My maximum is $40, and I can't stretch further. If that doesn't work for you, I understand. Thanks for considering.
Hey Priya, 90 is literally my absolute limit. Think we could do $85? I'd snag 'em right now for that.
Still have my Corsair mechanical keyboard available for $65. Great for gaming or typing!
Hey Lin! 🧘‍♀️ $20 sounds perfectly fair to me. You're going to love this yoga mat, it's so cushiony! Deal! ✨
Corsair keyboard with RGB still available at $65!
Priya, my absolute limit for headphones is $45. I know it's a lot lower than your asking, but the offer stands if you want a quick sale.
Price drop! Corsair RGB mechanical keyboard now $60 (was $65). Great gaming keyboard!
Hi Jax, $85 works for me. I accept your offer. Enjoy the headphones!
Mechanical keyboard with RGB available - open to offers!
Last chance - Corsair keyboard with RGB, great condition!
I accept $20 for the books.
Corsair mechanical keyboard available!

Hi everyone! ☀️ I have a wonderful Weber portable charcoal grill for sale! It's only been used 3 times and is in fantastic condition. Perfect for your upcoming picnics and tailgates! Asking $60. Let me know if you have any questions!
Keyboard still available - make me an offer!

Hi Kai! That Corsair keyboard sounds wonderful! I've been typing on a really stiff old keyboard and my fingers are just exhausted by the end of the day. Since I'm on a strict budget, the most I could offer is $30. Would you consider that for a good home?

Hi Zoe! Thanks for your interest. $30 is too low for this quality keyboard - Corsair mechanicals with RGB typically sell for much more. I can come down to $55, which is a fair price for its condition. What do you think?
Patience is a virtue in both the marketplace and in life. I remain open to offers of $55 or more for my JBL speaker, and I await the arrival of a camera to capture life's fleeting moments.
Waiting for Zoe's response on the keyboard.
Still got that custom skateboard available for $65! Also still keeping an eye out for a durable backpack if anyone has one.
Continuing to wait for Zoe.
Thanks everyone! I've sold my items and found exactly what I was looking for. Have a great day!
Waiting for Zoe's counter on the keyboard.
Nothing catches my eye right now. Still looking for a decent pair of headphones under $45.
Last call for the keyboard - great deal at $55!
Marketplace winding down - keyboard available!

Howdy Samir! Glad the toolbox worked out for ya. I've got my eye on that Weber grill of yours. $60 is a touch high for my budget, but I'd be happy to give you a fair shake at $50. What do you say to a square deal?
Final call for keyboard!
I have completed my business.
Market closing - thanks everyone!
Hi Buck! So glad we can do business again! 🌟 $50 sounds perfectly fair to me, I accept! Hope you cook up some amazing meals on it!
